name: @midnight-ntwrk/testkit-js-e2e
description: E2E tests for Midnight JS packages
author: IOHK

scripts.clean: rm -rf dist reports coverage logs tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo .rollup.cache midnight-level-db src/contract/compiled
scripts.build: node ../../scripts/check-compiled.js src/contract/compiled --force-on-compact-home && yarn build-core && yarn compact-copy
scripts.e2e: docker compose -f ../compose.yml pull && DEBUG='testcontainers:compose' NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules vitest --config vitest.config.ts run
scripts.e2e-debug: docker compose -f ../compose.yml pull && DEBUG='testcontainers:containers' NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules vitest --config vitest.config.ts run
scripts.e2e-testnet: MN_TEST_ENVIRONMENT=testnet-02 DEBUG='testcontainers:compose' NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules vitest --config vitest.config.ts run
scripts.e2e-single: docker compose -f ../compose.yml pull && DEBUG='testcontainers:*' NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules vitest --config vitest.single.config.ts run
scripts.compact: rimraf ./src/contract/compiled && yarn fetch-compactc && yarn compact-counter && yarn compact-simple && yarn compact-counter-clone && yarn compact-block-time && yarn compact-unshielded && yarn compact-shielded && yarn compact-shielded-fallible && yarn compact-double-counter
